violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the cafeteria, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/23/2026

The dish machine was observed non-operational and in poor repair. Milk chest #1 was observed holding an ambient temperature of 46 DF and in poor repair. Establishment is not to store any TCS foods in unit until it is able to hold an ambient temperature of 41 DF or less. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/09/2026

Along the walls behind equipment in the kitchen area has an accumulation of soil residue, droppings, and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/09/2026

The door to the outside, located in the cafeteria, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/23/2025

The following equipment was observed in poor repair -The drain stopper for the first bay of the 3-bay sink was observed being held up-right with plastic wrap -Dish machine is not working properly and is non-operational -Slicer is not working properly and is non-operational Equipment must be in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025
The plumbing under the 3rd bay for the 3-bay sink was observed leaking into a bucket. Establishment must fix leak. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. PIC informed to use sanitizer in 3 bay sink to sanitize. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

The door to the outside, located in the dish area, is not tight-fitting. Outside light was observed under door. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025
The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -Mixer shield, -Utensil drawers. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025
The hanging dish machine detergent dispenser was observed in poor repair (leaking). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025

The window ledges in the kitchen area has an accumulation of soil residue and other debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2024
One container of sour cream was observed exceeding use-by date. PIC disposed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2024

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings within facility. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the can opener base have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment (slicer) or items were observed in the kitchen area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2024
Inspector observed a large hole along building foundation in ground, near rear entrance to kitchen. Physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Can opener was placed at 3 bay sink to be cleaned and sanitized before use. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2023

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings on the floor behind milk coolers, the bottom of the floor mixer, on the outside of a box of sheet pan liners , and on top of canned goods on the storage rack. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the base of the floor mixer have a accumulation of rodent droppings. The non-food contact surfaces of the can opener base have an accumulation of dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2023

Gnawed packages of pasta observed, along with rodent droppings observed on dinner rolls, gravy mix, dried potatoes, pasta, and canned goods (#10 cans). Pasta, dinner rolls, gravy mix, and potatoes were disposed of. All canned goods must be cleaned and sanitized before opening. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/17/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Can opener was taken to the 3 bay sink to be cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/17/2023

The presence of mice is not controlled as evidenced by gnawed food, and droppings observed on food in storage bins & on dry storage shelves, along with shelves and dry goods in kitchen. Rodent droppings observed inside and/or on containers of plastic wrap and pan liners. Plastic wrap and pan liners were disposed of. Rodent droppings also observed on floor throughout the kitchen and behind milk units in the cafeteria. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Safe-Guard Pest Control, last dates of service 6/24/2023 and 7/8/2023. New Violation. Correct By: 08/17/2023
Gaskets on milk coolers not in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2023

Inside of milk coolers are lined with plastic. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 08/17/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of food containers, and kitchen shelves & counters have an accumulation of rodent droppings. The can opener base including plastic insert has an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. Milk cooler and refrigerator gaskets have an accumulation of mold and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 08/17/2023

The floors in the kitchen and cafeteria have an accumulation of rodent droppings. The outside area near the dumpster has an accumulation of debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/17/2023
